metadata.name: Homer
metadata.description: Simple static homepage for your server to keep your services on hand, configured through a single YAML file.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Simple static homepage for your server to keep your services on hand, configured through a single YAML file.

## How to Use
This template renders `compose.yaml` as a file.

1. Decide on stack naming, ports, placement, and whether the dashboard should be exposed directly or through Traefik.
2. Fill in the required service settings first, then enable optional integrations such as Traefik and Authentik only when needed.
3. Render the stack files, review the generated assets and routing, and deploy them with Docker Swarm in the target environment.

## Variable Guide
### General
- `service_name`: Service Name; optional; default: homer.
- `container_timezone`: Container Timezone; optional.
- `homer_title`: Dashboard title; optional; default: Dashboard.
- `homer_subtitle`: Dashboard subtitle; optional; default: Dashboard.
- `homer_logo`: Logo file path (relative to assets/); optional; default: logo.png.

### Ports
- `ports_http`: Host port for HTTP (8080); optional; default: 8080.

### Traefik
- `traefik_enabled`: Enable Traefik integration; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_entrypoint`: The Traefik entrypoint; required; default: web.
- `traefik_host`: Traefik Host; optional; default: dashboard.
- `traefik_network`: Traefik Network; required; default: traefik.
- `traefik_domain`: Traefik Domain; required; default: home.arpa.

### Traefik Tls
- `traefik_tls_enabled`: Enable Traefik TLS; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_tls_entrypoint`: The Traefik TLS entrypoint; required; default: websecure.
- `traefik_tls_certresolver`: Traefik Tls Certresolver; required; default: cloudflare.

### Docker Swarm
- `swarm_placement_mode`: Swarm Placement Mode; required; default: replicated; options: replicated, global.
- `swarm_replicas`: Swarm Replicas; required; default: 1; shown when: swarm_placement_mode=replicated.
- `swarm_placement_host`: Swarm Placement Host; optional; shown when: swarm_placement_mode=replicated.

### Authentik SSO
- `authentik_enabled`: Enable Authentik SSO integration; optional; default: false.
- `authentik_traefik_middleware`: Authentik Traefik Middleware; required; default: auth-middleware@file; shown when: authentik_enabled=true.

## References
- [GitHub](https://github.com/bastienwirtz/homer)
- [Configuration Guide](https://github.com/bastienwirtz/homer/blob/main/docs/configuration.md)

## Next Steps
1. Deploy the stack:
   docker stack deploy -c compose.yaml <stack-name>

2. Customize your dashboard:
   - Edit `assets/config.yml` to add your services
   - Organize services into groups such as Applications and Monitoring
   - Add links to the navbar for quick access

3. Optional: Add a logo:
   - Place your logo file in the `assets/` directory
   - Or update the logo path in `assets/config.yml`

4. Access your dashboard:
   <% if traefik_enabled -%>
   - Via Traefik: https://<< traefik_host >>.<< traefik_domain >>
   <%- else -%>
   - Direct access: http://localhost:<< ports_http >>
   <%- endif %>

For more information, visit: https://github.com/bastienwirtz/homer/blob/main/docs/configuration.md

variables.name: homer_title
variables.title: Dashboard title
variables.description: Value used for the general settings.

variables.name: homer_subtitle
variables.title: Dashboard subtitle
variables.description: Value used for the general settings.
